tasks.title: Fix mobile navigation to use overlay pattern
tasks.description: Read existing files src/components/Navbar.jsx and src/components/Navbar.css to understand current navigation structure. Implement a mobile-friendly navigation solution: 1) Add a hamburger menu icon that appears on mobile viewports (typically <= 768px). 2) Implement toggle state management in Navbar.jsx to show/hide the mobile menu. 3) Rework Navbar.css to use an overlay or slide-in drawer pattern for mobile — the menu should overlay the page content (using position: fixed or absolute with a higher z-index) instead of pushing content down. 4) Ensure the navigation links remain accessible and functional on mobile. 5) Test across all pages (Home, About, Projects, Skills, Contact) to verify page content remains visible when menu is open. 6) Write or update tests in src/components/Navbar.test.jsx to cover mobile menu toggle behavior and rendering.
acceptance_criteria: Mobile menu uses overlay/drawer pattern that doesn't push content out of view
Hamburger menu icon appears on mobile viewports
Navigation is accessible across all pages

tasks.title: Validate mobile navigation fix
tasks.description: Run the Navbar component test suite using 'npx vitest run src/components/Navbar.test.jsx' to validate the mobile navigation implementation. Verify that all tests pass, including mobile menu toggle behavior and rendering. If tests fail, report the failures with full error messages.
acceptance_criteria: All Navbar tests pass with zero failures
